allow:
Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.development PYTHONPATH=backend .venv/bin/python backend/manage.py check --deploy 2>&1 | head -30 && echo "===" && DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.development PYTHONPATH=backend .venv/bin/python backend/manage.py show_urls 2>&1 | head -40 || DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.development PYTHONPATH=backend .venv/bin/python -c "
from django.urls import get_resolver
resolver = get_resolver\(\)
for pattern in resolver.url_patterns:
    print\(pattern\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 4 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8000/api/docs/ && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8000/api/schema/ && echo "")
